item.title: Radiant Vision Systems Merges with Konica Minolta Sensing Americas to Expand Global Sensing Solutions
item.description: Radiant Vision Systems, a leading provider of imaging systems for scientific evaluation of light sources and displays, announced the merger with its sister company, Konica Minolta Sensing Americas, to form a new company.

item.title: InnovMetric Announces the Acquisition of Digisens’ Intellectual Property
item.description: InnovMetric, the leading provider of 3D metrology solutions for the manufacturing industry, has announced that it has acquired the intellectual property of French company Digisens.

item.title: Nion ToF Camera Brings High-Resolution 3D Vision to Industry
item.description: Nion provides stable depth data even under variable lighting conditions for automation processes that rely on fast and accurate 3D data.

item.title: Sentinel Vision and Zebra Technologies Launch AI, 3D Automated Inspection System
item.description: Sentinel Vision and Zebra Technologies have developed an AI-driven 3D inspection system that improves automotive door assembly quality by replacing manual checks with automated, scalable solutions, reducing errors and increasing efficiency.

item.title: Swiss Delvitech raises ₹354-crore, to open mfg plant for optical inspection machines in India - ET Telecom
item.description: Swiss Delvitech raises ₹354-crore, to open mfg plant for optical inspection machines in India

item.title: FANUC America Invests 0M in Michigan Facility to Boost U.S. Robotics Manufacturing
item.description: FANUC America, a global leader in robotics and automation systems, has announced plans for a 0 million investment to acquire property and construct a new 840,000 sq. ft. facility in Michigan providing production-ready space for the potential expansion of the company's existing U.S.-based manufacturing capabilities for robots.

item.title: Designing Inspection Systems for Challenging Surfaces
item.description: Modern manufacturing increasingly relies on full in-line inspections to maintain quality standards, reduce scrap, and improve traceability.
